rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: BITSAdmin Downloading Malicious Binaries (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: BITSAdmin Downloading Malicious Binaries (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 0a6b7cc5-f28e-4795-94bf-48112d89664b
status: experimental
description: "Detects attempts to bypass security controls using bitsadmin.exe to\
  \ download malicious code. \nPart of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/ingress-tool-transfer/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \bitsadmin.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - download
    - transfer
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
